response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates exceptional software engineering breadth and depth across 15+ years, the role requirements are not met. Most critically, native-level Japanese language proficiency is explicitly required and completely absent from the resume. Additionally, the candidate shows no demonstrated experience with the core technical domains: security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption, attack detection) and embedded networking (switch operation, NETCONF, SNMP, hardware control). Recent career trajectory (2021-present) has shifted toward TypeScript/Node.js web and cloud platforms, moving away from embedded systems and C, making domain ramp-up steep.
strengths: 15+ years of multi-platform software development with proven ability to master new domains and languages
Demonstrated C/C++ proficiency with embedded systems background (National Instruments, robotic arms, measurement software)
Strong Linux and infrastructure expertise with kernel-level understanding shown through deployment and CI/CD infrastructure work
concerns: Zero evidence of native-level Japanese language proficiency, which is an explicit required qualification
No demonstrated experience with security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal, encryption, attack detection, tamper detection) central to the role
Complete absence of embedded networking domain knowledge (network switches, Layer-2/3 operations, NETCONF, SNMP, chip SDKs); recent 4+ years focused on web/cloud, moving away from embedded systems

key_factors.factor: No security and embedded networking domain expertise
Extensive general software development and C/Linux background
